nodes.name: Fetch Payment Events
nodes.notes: Fetch all payment_received events from jobber_email_events for yesterday. Uses created_at range filter.

nodes.name: Match Leads
nodes.notes: Fetch leads matching payment emails OR phones. Uses PostgREST OR filter.

nodes.name: Upsert Revenue Attribution
nodes.notes: Upsert attribution records. merge-duplicates uses the table's unique constraints.
